heroes.name: Iron Vanguard

abilities.primary: Heavy melee swing with a short windup.
abilities.control: Shield bash that interrupts channeled or aimed abilities.
abilities.utility: Guard stance that reduces incoming frontal damage.

counterplay: Attack from angles that bypass guard stance.

abilities.dash: Blink slash through a target line.
abilities.control: Mark target; next hit consumes mark for bonus damage.

heroes.name: Burst Rifle

abilities.dash: Combat slide that reloads one burst.
abilities.control: Suppressive cone that slows enemies hit.
abilities.utility: Piercing shot for minion wave clear.

counterplay: Close distance after slide is used.
Use cover to break firing lanes.

heroes.name: Longshot

abilities.control: Trap flare that reveals and slows.
abilities.utility: Focus mode for one empowered line shot.

counterplay: Force movement before the shot is charged.
Dive after backward roll is spent.

abilities.dash: Short blink that leaves a small healing pulse.
abilities.utility: Timed barrier that absorbs one burst window.

abilities.dash: Tempo step that briefly speeds nearby allies.
abilities.control: Dissonant chord that weakens enemy damage.
abilities.utility: Rally beat that grants a short movement and attack-speed window.
